value.found_quote: Memory Bank overview: Learn how to use Memory Bank to store long-term user preferences and facts.
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes Google's Memory Bank offering on Vertex AI / Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform, stating it is used to "store long-term user preferences and facts" and to "retrieve persistent, long-term memories, enabling highly personalized and natural user interactions." The page also clearly labels the feature as "Preview" under "Pre-GA Offerings Terms," confirming it is not yet generally available. The description closely matches the claim of a managed long-term memory store that persists user preferences and facts across agent sessions.
